decision.summary: Virlux is Labs Sandbox only — not Portfolio Spine, not ring-fenced production.
decision.supersedes: Hybrid Sovereign Path placing virlux inside Portfolio Spine

projects.agent_db_access: restricted — no direct prod writes from autonomous agents
allowed — only credential agents may hold
projects.graduation_trigger: Real money or real financial/user data → isolated Supabase project BEFORE ship, not after. See labs/virlux/README.md

integration.assumption_pending_founder_confirm: Noetfield/TrustField do not require live reads of Virlux transactional tables
